drugs.name: Amalaki
drugs.karma: Rasayana, Pramehaghna, Jwaraghna, Vrashya, Dahahara, Chardighna, Shophaghna Medohara, Keshya, Chakshushya, Kushthaghna.
drugs.indications: Prameha, Jwara, Pandu, Kamala, Raktapitta, Hikka, Kasa, Vatarakta

drugs.name: Aragwadha
drugs.karma: Phala (Fruit) - Sramsana, Shulahara, Ruchya, Koshtha Shuddhikara, Krimighna, Pramehaghna, Jwaraghna, Kushtaghna
drugs.doshaKarma: Vatapitta Shamaka and Pitta kapha samshodhaka.

drugs.name: Arjuna
drugs.karma: Hradya (Prabhavajanya karma), Vranahara, Artighna, Bhagna sandhanakara, Raktapittahara.

drugs.name: Ashoka
drugs.karma: Grahi, Varnya, Trishnahara, Daha Shamaka, Krimighna, Vranaropaka, Hradya, Sandhaniya, Vishaghna, Stambhaka.

drugs.name: Ashwagandha
drugs.karma: Balya, Rasayana, Shukrala, Kantivardhaka, Kasahara, Nadibalya, Shwitraghni, Kandughna, Krimighna, Shwasahara, Vishaghna, Vraanahara, Shophahara
drugs.indications: As a Rasayana, Shosha, Garbhadharanartha, Nidranasha, Shwasa

drugs.name: Ativisha
drugs.karma: Dipana, Pachana, Kasahara, Jwarahara, Krimighna, Vishaghna, Chardighna.

drugs.name: Agnimanth
drugs.botanicalName: Clerodendron phlomides, Linn of Suppl., Premna integrifolia Linn.
drugs.karma: Shothaghna, Agnivardhaka, Vibandhahara & Jwarahara
drugs.indications: Vasameha, Arshas, Urusthambha, Shitapitta, Granthi visarpa

drugs.name: Ahiphena
drugs.karma: Niryasa (Latex): Grahi, Madaka, Ruchikara, Agnivardhaka, Stambhaka, Vedanasthapaka, Nidrajanaka. Phalatwak (Fruit bark): Grahi, Mohakara, Ruchya, Agnivardhaka. Bija (Seed): Balya, Vrashya
drugs.doshaKarma: Niryasa is Kaphahara, Bija is Pittahara

drugs.name: Ajamoda
drugs.botanicalName: Carum roxburghianum Benth. / Apium graveolens Linn.
drugs.karma: Dipana, Ruchikara, Shulahara, Hridya, Vrishya, Balya, Krimighna, Chardighna, Hikkanigrahana, Bastirujahara.

drugs.name: Apamarga
drugs.karma: Agnidipaka, Saraka, Pachaka, Vamaka, Chedana.
drugs.indications: Arshas, Raktarshas, Visuchika, Nadivrana, Atyagni, Shastrakshata

drugs.name: Asthishrunkhala
drugs.karma: Bhagna Sandhanakara, Arshoghna, Krimighna, Netrarogahara, Pachana, Vrishya, Balya.

drugs.name: Bala
drugs.karma: Balya, Kantikara, Grahi, Vrashya, Ojo vardhaka, Ayu vardhaka, Stambhana (Bala phala), Brahmana, Shothahara, Rasayana, Hradya.
drugs.indications: Vatavyadhi, Vatarakta, Madatyayaja Trashna, Shlipada, Bahu Shosha

drugs.name: Beejaka
drugs.karma: Sara (Heart wood) - Pramehahara, Twachya, Keshya, Krimighna, Visarpahara, Kushthaghna, Medohara, Rasayana, Galadoshahara, Stambhana, Rakta Shodhaka. Pushpa (Flower) - Keshya, Pachana

drugs.name: Bhallataka
drugs.karma: Bhallataka phala- Pachana, Chedana, Bhedana, Medhya, Dipana, Vranahara, Kushthahara, Arsoghna, Jwarahara, Krimighna, Sukrala, Grahi and Balya. Bhallataka majja - Vrishya, Bramhana, Dahashamaka, Tarpaka, Dipana. Bhallatakāsthi - Pachaka, Medhya, Dipaka, Krimighna.

drugs.name: Bharangi
drugs.karma: Shwasahara, Kasahara, Pachana, Dipana, Shothahara, Jwaraghna, Krimighna, Dahahara, Vranahara, Ruchikara, Arshoghna.

drugs.name: Bhrungaraja
drugs.karma: Keshya, Twachya, Krimighna, Shwasahara, Kasahara, Dantya, Rasayana, Balya, Netrya.

drugs.name: Bhumyamalaki
drugs.karma: Kasahara, Kandughna, Dahahara, Rochaka, Kushthaghna, Shwasahara, Trishnahara, Shothahara, Mehahara and Mutrarogahara.

drugs.name: Bilva
drugs.karma: Mula (Root) - Shothahara, Chardighna, Shuulahara. Patra (Leaf) - Sangrahi, Pramehaghna, Shothahara. Kasisa (Stem) - Kasahara, Hradya, Ruchya, Agnivardhaka. Apakwa phala (Unripen fruit) - Dipana, Pachana, Grahi, Hradya. Pakwaphala (Ripen fruit) - Vidahi Vishtambhi, Durjara, Agnisadaka. Pushpa (Flowers) -Atisarahara, Trishnahara, Chardighna.
drugs.indications: Atisara, Raktatisara, Chardi, Arshas, Balaroga, Medoroga

drugs.name: Brahmi
drugs.karma: Medhya, Ayushyakara, Rasayana, Swarya, Smrati Vardhaka, Kushthaghna, Pandujit, Mehahara, Vishaghna, Shothahara, Jwarahara, Hradya, Kandughna, Shwasahara, Kasahara.

drugs.name: Bakuchi
drugs.karma: Bija - Shwitraghna, Rasayana, Ruchya, Hradya, Shwasahara, Kushthaghna, Mehahara, Krimighna, Medhya, Dipana, Kandughna. Phala Kushthaghna, Keshya, Twachya, Krimighna, Shwasahara, Kasahara, Shothahara.

drugs.name: Bruhati
drugs.karma: Kasahara, Hradya, Pachana, Ruchikara, Kushthaghna, Shwasahara, Kanthya, Shulahara, Agnivardhaka, Chardighna. Sarpatanu (Variety) - Kasahara, Shwasahara. Shweta Brahati - Ruchya, Netrya

drugs.name: Chandana
drugs.karma: Ahladakara, Shramahara, Trashnahara, Raktaprasadaka, Vrishya, Dahahara, Krimighna, Twakdosha hara, Saumanasya janana, Hradya, Kushthaghna, Jwaraghna, Angamarda prashamana..
drugs.indications: Raktatisara, Raktarshas, Shukra meha, Chardi, Pittajwara

drugs.name: Chitraka
drugs.karma: Chitraka - Dipana, Pachana, Kushthaghna, Arshoghna, Shothahara, Krimighna, Kasahara, Grahi, Rochaka, Kandughna. Rakta Chitraka - Ruchya, Kushthaghna & Rasayana.

drugs.name: Chakramarda
drugs.karma: Kushthaghna, Kandughna, Dadrughna, Krimighna, Shwasahara, Hridya, Jwaraghna, Medohara, Vranaropaka.

drugs.name: Dadima
drugs.usefulParts: Phala twak (Rind), Kanda twak, Mula twak (Stem & Root bark) & Pushpa (Flowers).
drugs.karma: Madhura Ddima - Dahahara, Jwarahara, Tarpana Shukrala, Medhya, Balya, Hradya. Madhuramla Dadima phala - Dipana, Ruchya. Amla Dadima phala - Ruchya, Dipana. Dadima phala twak - Grahi

drugs.name: Dhataki
drugs.karma: Trashnahara, Stambhaka, Vishaghna, Krimighna, Visarpahara, Garbha sthapaka, Madakara, Vranahara, Sandhaniya, Mutravirajaniya.

drugs.name: Dhamasa
drugs.karma: Trishnahara, Kushthaghna, Visarpanashaka, Jwaraghna, Dahanashaka, Chardighna, Madajit, Bhramajit, Vataraktanashaka.

drugs.name: Dhanyaka
drugs.karma: Shushka Dhanyaka - Dipana, Pachana, Mutrala, Jwaraghna, Rochaka, Grahi, Trahara, Dahahara, Chardighna, Shwasahara, Krimighna, Hradya. Ardra Dhanyaka - Dourgandhyahara, Hradya, Dipana, Pachana, Mutrala, Rochaka, Trashnahara & Dahahara. Dhanyaka Shaka - Ruchya, Dipana, Mutrala & Jwaraghna.

drugs.name: Eranda
drugs.karma: Eranda mula - Vrashya, Shulahara, Shothahara, Shirapida hara, Jwarahara, Anahahara, Kasanashaka, Kushthaghna. Eranda Beeja- Bhedana, Shulahara, Dipana, Arshoghna, Udarapaha, Krimighna, Mutrakracchrahara. Eranda patra - Krimighna, Mutradoshahara, Bastishulahara.

drugs.name: Ela
drugs.karma: Sukshmaila - Shwasahara, Kasahara, Arshoghna, Mutrakrcchraghna, Rochanaa, Dipana, Hradya, Mukhashodhaka. Sthulaila - Shwasahara, Kandughna, Trishnahara, Hrallasanashaka, Kasahara, Vishaghna, Rochaka, Chardighna.

drugs.name: Gokshura
drugs.karma: Shothahara, Mutrala, Bastishodhaka, Balya, Dipana, Vrashya, Ashmarihara, Pramehahara, Shwasahara, Kasahara, Arshoghna, Hradya.

drugs.name: Guduchi
drugs.karma: Jwarahara, Rasayana, Sangrahi, Dipana, Amahara, Trashnahara, Dahahara, Pramehaghna, Kasahara, Kusnthaghna, Balya, Krmighna, Chardighna, Arshoghna, Medhya, Hradya, Chakshushya, Vayasthapana. Kanda Guduchi - Jwarahara, Vishaghni, Bhutagni, Valipalitanashini
drugs.indications: Prameha, Jwara, Vataja Jwara, Vatarakta, Amlapitta

drugs.name: Guggulu
drugs.guna: Tikshna, Sara, Sukshma, Snigdha, Laghu, Vishada
drugs.karma: Medohara, Amavatahara, Pramehahara, Bhagna Sandhanakara, Vrashya, Swarya, Rasayana, Dipana, Balya, Vranahara, Kushthaghna, Shophahara, Arshoghna, Krmihara, Varnya, Brahmana. Nava Guggulu Karma (Actions of fresh Guggulu) ---Brahmana, Vrashya
drugs.indications: Vatavyadhi, Amavata, Shotha, Vatarakta, Urustambha, Sthoulya

drugs.name: Gambhari
drugs.karma: Mula - Shothahara, Dipana, Pachana, Bhedana, Shoshahara, Trashnahara, Amahara, Shulahara, Arshoghna, Vishaghna, Dahashamaka, Jwarahara, Shramahara, Raktapittahara. Phala Brahmana, Vrashya, Keshya, Rasayana, Trashnahara, Dahashamaka, Hradya, Medhya. Pushpa- Sangrahi, Raktapittahara.

drugs.name: Haridra
drugs.karma: Varnya, Twachya, Pramehahara, Shothahara, Vranahara, Kandughna, Vishaghna, Kushthaghna, Krimighna, Ruchikara, Shitapittahara. Amragandhi Haridra Kandughna. Vana Haridra Kushthaghna & Vataraktanashaka.
drugs.indications: Prameha, Dadru Kushtha, Vatarakta, Kaphaja Trishna, Panduroga

drugs.name: Haritaki
drugs.karma: Rasayana, Medhya, Caksushya, Brhmana, Anulomana, Shwasahara, Kasahara, Pramehahara, Arsoghna, Kushthagna, Shothahara, Krimighna, Vibandhahara, Trishnanigraha, Chardighna, Kandughna, Hradya, Shulahara, Lekhana, Dipana, Pachana, Vayasthapaka, Smritiprada, Jwarahara, Vranahara.
drugs.indications: Vibandha, Chardi, Arshas, Pariņāma śūla, Vätavyādhi, Atisweda

drugs.name: Hingu
drugs.karma: Pachana, Ruchya, Krimighna, Shulahara, Hradya, Dipana, Kasahara, Shwasahara, Chakshushya..

drugs.name: Jambu
drugs.karma: Sangrahi, Rochana, Kanthya, Vishtambhi, Lekhana, Daha Shamaka, Shramahara, Krimighna, Shwasahara, Mehahara. Mahajambu - Swarya, Shramahara, Atisaraghni, Shwasahara, Kasahara. Kakajambu - Dahahara, Shramahara, Atisaraghni, Balya. Bhumijambu - Hradya, Sangrahi, Balya. Twak (Bark) - Sangrahi
drugs.indications: Raktapitta, Chardi, Atisara, Vrina Ropanartha, Madhumeha

drugs.name: Jatamansi
drugs.karma: Medhya, Dahahara, Kushthahara, Visarpanut, Vishaghna, Twachya, Kantiprasadaka, Balya, Bhutaghni, Nidrajanaka. Gandhamamsi - Raktapittahara, Varnya, Vishaghni, Bhutaghni, Jwarahara. Akashamamsi - Shophahara, Vranahara, Varnya

drugs.name: Jyotishmati
drugs.karma: Medhya, Buddhi vardhaka, Smritivardhaka, Vamaka, Varnya, Vranahara, Dipana, Swedajanana, Uttejaka, Nadi balya.

drugs.name: Japa
drugs.karma: Keshya, Sangrahaka, Hridya, Shonitasthapana, Garbhanirodhaka, Mutrasangrahaniya.

drugs.name: Jatiphala
drugs.karma: Jatiphala (Fruit/Seed) - Grahi, Dipana, Rochana, Swarya, Dourgandhyahara, Krimighna, Kasahara, Shwasahara, Mehaghna, Vrashya and Hradya. Jatipatri (Arils) - Ruchikara, Varshya, Kasahara, Chardighna, Shwasahara, Trrashna nigraha, Krimighna, Vishaghna, Dourgandhyahara & Vrashya.

drugs.name: Jeeraka
drugs.karma: Dipana, Sangrahi, Medhya, Garbhashaya shodhaka, Jwaraghna, Pachana, Vrashya, Balya, Ruchya, Chakshushya, Chardini-grahana, Hradya, Krimighna, Vishaghna, Vranahara.

drugs.name: Kanchanara
drugs.karma: Kanchanara twak- Grahi, Krimighna, Kushthaghna, Gandamalahara, Vranahara, Kasahara. Kovidara twak - Gandamalahara, Kushthaghna, Krimighna, Dipana. Kanchanara pushpa -Sangrahi, Rochaka, Pradara nashaka, Kasahara. Kovidara pushpa-Pradaranashaka, Raktapittahara

drugs.name: Kantakari
drugs.karma: Mula (Root) - Kanthya, Kasahara, Shwasahara, Jwaraghna, Dipana, Pachana, Krimighna, Hridya, Kandughna, Kushthaghna, Rochana, Pramehahara. Phala (Fruit) - Shukra rechaka, Bhedana, Dipana, Kasahara, Shwasahara, Cakshushya, Balya.
drugs.indications: Shotha, Shwasa, Kasa, Jwara, Kantharoga, Agnimandya, Ajirna, Krimi, Hridroga, Kushtha, Aruchi, Pinasa, Parshwa Shula
